name: 约安娜·美里
introduction: Born and raised in Greece, Ioanna (ee-oh-ana) grew up performing in school stage productions around Europe. She found her love for film when she was cast in the award winning indie feature "Elvis' Last Song". Ioanna trained at Goldsmiths College University of London, UCLA, Guildhall School of Music & Drama, the New York Film Academy. Her work has screened in festivals including Berlinale, Tribeca Film Festival, Cannes International Film Festival and Athens International Film Festival.
